subject: DMaaP MR changes for ElAlto early drop
commit_message:
DMaaP MR changes for ElAlto early drop

Issue-ID: DMAAP-1270
Change-Id: Icd0cf60921750b84840a5a344eb15a736684e329
Signed-off-by: su622b <su622b@att.com>
(cherry picked from commit fdce6590ce5747ddc87baf74dd902dae6ee035e7)

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

could you paste install results with staging oom branch if possible ?

Patch Set 1:

if its alot of work we can base it on the master install
